data.biography:
Earth Pirapat Watthanasetsiri is a Thai actor under GMMTV. In 2018, he graduated with a bachelor's degree from the Faculty of Fine Arts at Srinakharinwirot University, majoring in Performing Arts.

He made his acting debut in 2016 with a guest role in the special short film "Little Big Dream".

Aside his acting career, Earth owns the chain of massage parlors 'NIKKO THAI MASSAGE'.
data.name: Pirapat Watthanasetsiri
พิรพัฒน์ วัฒนเศรษสิริ
